title: ANIMAL SERVICES - 211info
text: WASHINGTON COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES ANIMAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Picks up stray dogs, cares for stray pets until owners can be contacted, and finds homes for animals not picked up by owners. Provides removal of dead cats or dogs (from public property and roadways only). Investigates cruelty/neglect cases and provides community education about animal care/behavior. Provides dog and puppy licensing services. 1901 SE 24th Avenue MS 53 Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Walk-in: Monday-Friday 11am-4pm Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 846-7041 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 846-7041 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information. Dog licensing provided in person, phone, email, or website. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Walk-in: Monday-Friday 11am-4pm Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet Bus Line 57. Near Lowe's Home Improvement Store. Services: Animal Control Animal Licenses Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - BONNIE L. HAYS SMALL ANIMAL SHELTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WASHINGTON COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES
